text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hello there! Here, please have this flyer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon whisks a glossy flyer into my hands.
It reads, "A Festival☆of a Hundred Idols!"

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll be there as a representative for Umadols! If
you have the time... No, I mean, you'd better
come cheer me on, or else!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to practice nonstop for the event so I
can show everyone just how amazing Umadols
are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her extraordinary cheer and energy leaves a
lingering impression on me as I make my way to
the track.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Falcon said that "front runners've gotta leave! ☆"
...Have we left sufficiently?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I think it should be fine to keep going. I still want
to run anyway.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: W-wait! That's not what I said!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I said that us front runners've gotta lead! Which'd admittedly be easier on dirt! I wanna win center stage toooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Actually, is this even the kind of practice I should be
doing right now? Shouldn't I be focusing on more
Umadol-y things?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh! Great timing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering if I could I get your input on
something. What do you think is the best thing
about Umadols?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Is it how cute they are? Or maybe how powerful
their performances are?
choice_data_list: I'm not exactly an Umadol exper—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's okay! Just look at me and tell me what your
knee-jerk answer is!
choice_data_list: The best thing is how cute they are!
The best thing is how powerful they are!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I knew it! Okay, time to train my cuteness!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Now just follow my lead. Reaaaady?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Teehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oopsies! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
How was that? Do you think I'm good enough to
outshine a hundred idols?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I sure do! ♪ But if you're still feeling anxious, I
could give you a full crash course on being cute.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll let you in on a trick to not just capture
people's hearts, but their minds, their futures...
everything. Everyone'll spend so much time
thinking about you, they'll forget everything
else! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Gulp... Everyone's... everything...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, this doesn't feel right at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing the practice session through, I go out
and don't get back till late. When I return...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yup, power is definitely a huge part of an
Umadol's appeal!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And I know just the person to ask for help when it
comes to building strength!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Great work! Your muscles are leaping for joy! Ten
more deadlift reps to go!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Nrghhh... hrghhh! ☆ Yaaaargh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Whoooooa!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Man, you're really something! You've got a great
set of muscles! Keep going and they'll bulk up in
no time!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aw, Ryan! Hey, then do you think—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You can reach the top, I just know it! You're sure
to nab first place in any bodybuilding contest you
enter!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No thank you! No bodybuilding contests for me!
I'll be sure to show off my new muscles at my next
concert, though!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing the practice session through, I go out
and don't get back till late. When I return...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Umadols... for life...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Wow, we've been running into each other a
lot. Thanks for tagging along with my training
session earlier today!
choice_data_list: Wait, have you been practicing this whole time?
Wait, have you been practicing this whole time?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yep! There's going to be a hundred idols
performing together, after all. This is my big
chance to show fans what being an Umadol is all
about!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm super-duper cute and powerful to boot! Even
if I've... still got a long way to go.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But despite that, they still picked me to represent Umadols! I've got to put on the best performance I can for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umadols were the ones who showed me a dream,
and I want to do the same and give hope to
others too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's right! I... I really love Umadols.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Huh. Maybe that was the most important thing all
along... Hehe, thanks for the hint!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I should give you a guest pass for all your
troubles. ☆ Now you have to come!
